---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an addition or change to foodvision-bench
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why does this belong in foodvision-bench? What problem does it solve for
someone running or reading the benchmarks?

## Proposed change

Sketch of the API / CLI / docs change. Pseudocode is fine.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered, and why the proposed change is preferable.

## Breaking changes

Does this change any existing behavior, metrics, or results JSON schema?
